repair_plan.repaired_text_preview:
# Kinematic Mover Demo

event_pipe
   file output/kinematic_mover_demo.aer
end_event_pipe

end_time 600 sec

platform_type FLYER WSF_PLATFORM
   icon F-15
   side blue
   spatial_domain air
   mover WSF_KINEMATIC_MOVER
   end_mover
end_platform_type

platform flyer1 FLYER
   position 30.00n 104.00e altitude 5000 m

   mover
      initial_speed 200 m/sec
      initial_flight_path_angle 0 deg
      target_speed 200 m/sec
      maximum_linear_acceleration 5 m/sec^2
      maximum_radial_acceleration 15 m/sec^2
      maximum_body_turn_rate 3 deg/sec
      update_interval 0.1 sec
   end_mover

   route
      label begin
      position 30.00n 104.00e altitude 5000 m speed 200 m/sec
      position 31.00n 105.00e altitude 5000 m speed 200 m/sec
   end_route

   heading 45 deg
end_platform
